plugins.name: mobile
plugins.description: Mobile development — React Native, Expo, Flutter, SwiftUI, Jetpack Compose, app store

plugins.name: skills
plugins.description: Skill discovery and authoring — find skills with scout, create new universal skills with skill-builder

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: Marketing automation — social media content creation, posting, and engagement across 11 platforms, plus Slack messaging

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Personal productivity automation — expert network survey completion and paid expertise sharing

plugins.name: google-workspace
plugins.description: Google Workspace CLI (gws) — unified access to Gmail, Drive, Sheets, Docs, Calendar, Chat, Admin, and 40+ Google APIs

plugins.name: frontend
plugins.description: Frontend development — visual design with browser verification, Figma-to-code workflows, Code Connect publishing, design tokens, and design system integration across React, Vue, SwiftUI, and Compose

plugins.name: easychamp
plugins.description: EasyChamp tournament management — create sports leagues and tournaments, build brackets, schedule matches with venues, and record results. Backed by the EasyChamp MCP server.

plugins.name: personal
plugins.description: Personal knowledge and finance automation — autonomous Obsidian vault management (PARA + LLM Wiki) and end-to-end corporate/personal tax preparation from Xero, bank statements, and Google Drive

plugins.name: codex-bridge
plugins.description: Cross-runtime plugin demonstrator — ships one strict-mode SKILL.md (agents-md-author) installable in both Anthropic Claude Code and OpenAI Codex CLI from the same source. Reference implementation for the dual-manifest authoring pattern (.claude-plugin/ + .codex-plugin/).

metadata.description: Universal AI skills library — domain expertise for any AI coding tool
